selections.rationale: Both Ch31 audit items merged to Ch32 per plan — pre-avoidance naturalization addresses cognitive barrier, emotional broadening via crowd-in-cold addresses narrow emotional range

adjustments.rationale: context/chapter-32-context.md and context/chapter-32-context-decisions.json not found; loaded from plan + truth files + adjacent chapters

Saturday assessment crowd in cold provides emotional broadening through material details (foot stomp/visible breath/shrugging necks/hands in pockets/contrast ratio of light in cold/oppression in queue silence) — reader perceives oppression without parameter framework

budget.pacing_notes: Ch32 spans Saturday morning→Saturday afternoon→Saturday evening—single calendar day. No Sunday/Monday baseline transition as in Ch29. Emotional baseline: quiet that knows Saturday is in the calendar—quiet now contains calendrical knowledge + pre-avoidance knowledge. Assessment trajectory: Ch29 discovery→Ch31 habitual→Ch32 calendrical finalization—Saturday in knowing, no discovery needed. Cold progression: deep autumn at second week depth—cold changes queue body behavior (foot stomp, visible breath concentration above queues, hand depth in pockets rediscovered, shoulders shrugged, contrast ratio elevated by cold). Pre-avoidance habituation: archive administrator metaphor replaces clock metaphor—natural path avoidance, no decision, no analysis. Emotional broadening: queue crowd oppression through material cold details—cold density in shadows, light sharpness in cold air, weighted breathing collective, body weight alternation rhythm, silence in waiting. MH-020: numbers moved down to 10.5/10.9/11.1—seasonal progression. MH-003: engine sound in Saturday cold air—clearer/brighter, cold changes high-frequency transmission, engine sound has its own week calendar. Phase 2: Saturday condensation morphology registered as distinct from weekday—no causal inference. Door frame: difference presence rate maintained at second week Saturday same as first week Saturday—no comparison between weeks. Offset strategy: not activated by Saturday line—same level as day 1. Transition words: 0. Exit: shorter than Ch31 (~70 chars vs ~90)—no analytical review of Saturday passage.
